text: Tender lamb marinated in chile sauce, wrapped in maguey leaves, and slow-cooked until juicy. A flavorful dish that honors ancient cooking traditions.
Vegetarian tamales filled with sautéed Swiss chard, onion, and spices. Steamed in corn husks and served with salsa, they’re a comforting and nutritious local favorite.
Ant larvae sautéed with epazote and garlic, served over crispy tostadas with avocado and fresh herbs. A delicacy with deep pre-Hispanic roots and bold flavor.
